violations.text: A package of baking ingredients was observed with droppings on top of it. Product was disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener placed in dish machine. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by adulterated product and droppings in the dry good area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026

The slicer's meat grip was observed in poor repair. Slicer to discontinue being used until equipment in repaired/replaced. Equipment taken out of service. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026

Cheese was observed held at 47 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC moved food to another refrigeration unit. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2024

The following equipment were observed in poor repair: 1) The blade of the deli slicer was observed with slight bends and chipped edges 2) A flip top prep unit was off (due to not holding adequate ambient temperature) and ice was being used instead 3) Several faucets throughout the facility were lacking handles New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the deli slicer were observed with an accumulation of food debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2024
The condensate from a unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024

The following areas of the physical facilities were observed with an accumulation of debris: 1) The floor in unused areas of the kitchen had old rodent droppings 2) The ceiling above the prep areas had an accumulation of dust 3) The floor behind and under cooking equipment had grease and other debris New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024
The floor near a drain in the cook line area was observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2024
The menu is lacking an allergy statement. PIC stated new menus will be printed. New Violation. Correct By: 08/17/2023
